# layout.Card: enhancements

* loadModule() should use `applyChildAttributes()`
* loadModule() should use the vdom items root instead of the top level node
* applyChildAttributes() => only call `update()` on created items
* applyRenderAttributes() => switch to the base class implementation
* removeRenderAttributes() => switch to the base class implementation
